data.name: ErrorSettingState
data.value: An error occurred while setting the state for {0}, aborting store.

data.name: ErrorSettingValue
data.value: An error occurred while setting the value for {0}, aborting store.

data.name: ErrorStoring
data.value: An error occurred while storing, aborting.

data.name: ConfirmResetStats
data.value: Are you absolutely sure you want to reset stats?

data.name: ConfirmResetAchievements
data.value: Do you want to reset achievements too?

data.name: ProtectedAchievement
data.value: Sorry, but this is a protected achievement and cannot be managed with SAM Evolved.

data.name: ProtectedTooltip
data.value: ⚠ Protected — server-validated achievement, cannot be modified locally

data.name: AllProtectedWarning
data.value:
All achievements in this game are server-validated and cannot be modified with SAM.
This game uses server-side achievement validation — changes will be rejected by Steam servers.

data.name: StatProtected
data.value: Stat is protected! -- you can't modify it

data.name: StatsEditingAgreement
data.value: I understand by modifying the values of stats, I may screw things up and can't blame anyone but myself.

data.name: GenericError
data.value: generic error -- this usually means you don't own the game

data.name: VacWarningText
data.value: ⚠ VAC / Anti-Cheat Protected — Editing achievements or statistics for this game may result in a VAC ban or account restrictions.

data.name: VacBlockedEdit
data.value:
This game uses VAC / Anti-Cheat protection. Modifying achievements or statistics is blocked to protect your account.
Click "I understand the risks" to override at your own risk.

data.name: VacStoreWarning
data.value:
This game uses VAC / Anti-Cheat protection!
Saving changes may result in: • VAC ban (permanent) • Game ban • Online features restriction
Are you absolutely sure you want to continue?

data.name: VacOverrideConfirm
data.value:
WARNING: You are about to enable editing for a VAC-protected game.
This may lead to: • Permanent VAC ban on your account • Loss of online multiplayer access • Game-specific bans
The developers are NOT responsible for any consequences.
Do you want to proceed?

data.name: VacWarningOverridden
data.value: ⚠ VAC protection override active — You are editing at your own risk. Any consequences are your responsibility.

data.name: VacUnlockAllWarning
data.value:
This game uses VAC / Anti-Cheat protection!
Unlocking all achievements may result in: • Permanent VAC ban • Game ban • Loss of online features
Yes — Unlock all (at your own risk) No — Cancel
Do you want to unlock all achievements?

data.name: VacActionWarning
data.value:
This game uses VAC / Anti-Cheat protection. Modifying achievements or statistics may result in a ban.
Are you sure you want to continue?

data.name: VacClickWarning
data.value:
This game uses VAC / Anti-Cheat protection.
Changing achievements may lead to a VAC ban or account restrictions. This warning will only appear once per session.
Do you want to edit achievements for this game?

data.name: LockAllConfirm
data.value: Are you sure you want to lock all achievements? This will uncheck all achievements in the list.
